canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating long-context models on real-world retrieval tasks, including argumentative retrieval, fact-checking, web search, and multi-hop reasoning question answering.
papers: GSM-$∞$: How Do your LLMs Behave over Infinitely Increasing Reasoning Complexity and Context Length?
